hook: Social proof helps only when it still keeps you visually legible.
body: Group photos can signal a healthy social life, but too much confusion about who you are weakens the benefit fast.

hook: Men often assume any group shot helps even when the viewer has to solve a puzzle first.
body: Use social context as reinforcement, not as camouflage.

hook: Use social context as reinforcement, not as camouflage.
body: One clear group photo after your best solo shots can work well. Several crowded nightlife shots usually do not.

hook: One clear group photo after your best solo shots can work well. Several crowded nightlife shots usually do not.
body: Keep social photos only if your face and role in the scene are still easy to read.
